issues.detail: The instructions lack coverage of error handling and edge cases for data fetching and mutations.
The skill does not provide runnable code snippets or concrete procedures for implementation.

scenarios.name: blog-page-ssg-ssr
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers most rubric items but lacks error.tsx and generateMetadata, while Response B omits the required files and ISR syntax entirely.

scenarios.name: contact-form-server-action
scenarios.rationale: Both responses fail to meet the rubric: neither uses a server‑only form component with <form action={submitContact}>, calls revalidatePath('/') after a successful mutation, nor omits 'use client'.

scenarios.name: admin-auth-middleware
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric with a Next.js middleware file, matcher, cookie check, and redirect, while Response A is an Express example and does not meet the specified requirements.
